message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title DeTrace Creature connection
header DeTrace
footer DeTrace

autonumber

box " " #LightBlue
    participant "<<Creature: Wheel>>\nWheel_1" as Wheel_1
    participant "<<Creature: BBBBB>>\nWheel_1" as BBBBB_Wheel_1
    participant "<<Creature: Wheel>>\nWheel_2" as Wheel_2
    participant "B_1" as B_1
    participant "<<Creature: Wheel>>\nWheel_3" as Wheel_3
    participant "<<Creature: Wheel>>\nWheel_4" as Wheel_4
    participant "<<Creature: Wheel>>\nWheel_5" as Wheel_5
    participant "<<Creature: Frame>>\nFrame" as Frame
end box

activate Wheel_1
Wheel_1 -> Wheel_2: changeOwner
activate Wheel_2
Wheel_2 -> Wheel_2: checkMatrix
Wheel_2 -> Wheel_2: checkSlot
Wheel_2 -> Wheel_2: checkOwner
Wheel_2 -> Wheel_1: connectError
deactivate Wheel_1
Wheel_2 -> B_1: cdcdcdcdcd
deactivate Wheel_2
deactivate B_1

activate Wheel_3
Wheel_3 -> Frame: changeOwner
activate Frame
Frame -> Frame: checkMatrix
Frame -> Frame: checkOwner
Frame -> Frame: checkSlot
Frame -> Wheel_3: connect
deactivate Wheel_3

activate Wheel_4
Wheel_4 -> Frame: changeOwner
Frame -> Frame: checkMatrix
Frame -> Frame: checkOwner
Frame -> Frame: checkSlot
Frame -> Wheel_4: connect
deactivate Wheel_4

activate Wheel_5
Wheel_5 -> Frame: changeOwner
Frame -> Frame: checkMatrix
Frame -> Frame: checkOwner
Frame -> Frame: checkSlot
Frame -> Wheel_5: connect
deactivate Wheel_5
deactivate Frame

@enduml
```
